title: Purpose of Copper
description: Why there's so many copper if there's no use for it?
body:
## What the idea?
Copper has the highest distribution among all ores, but it has almost no use beside decoration. Why not give it a more distinctive use in transportation, automation and machinery?

## What has changed?
Rails now made with copper and honey, iron swapped to copper in few recipes related to redstone, also saddles and nametag now craftabble with copper

You can check all the recipes in the gallery

## Quick note
This was created as datapack first, if you have issues with mod versions you can use datapack version instead
